title: CETSAx–NADPH: Explainable Protein–Metabolite Interaction Analysis
description: CETSAx–NADPH is a computational framework for analyzing protein stability responses to NADPH using CETSA data. It combines biophysical dose–response modeling (EC50, Hill, Δmax), composite sensitivity scoring, systems-level analysis (PCA, clustering, pathway enrichment, network modules), and sequence-based deep learning (ESM-2 protein language model) into a single Snakemake-orchestrated pipeline. The framework also provides explainable AI outputs (saliency maps, Integrated Gradients) for residue-level interpretation of model predictions.
